title: BAND-MAID YouTube Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of BAND-MAID on YouTube.

questions.question: Which of these BAND-MAID videos had the most views yesterday on YouTube?
questions.explanation:
BAND-MAID / Zen (Official Teaser Video)  MIKU KOBATO Ver.  MAPPAアニメ「全修。」オープニングテーマソング — Views: 106,124 | Yesterday: 68
BAND-MAID / Ready to Rock (Official Teaser Video)  TVアニメ「ロックは淑女の嗜みでして」オープニングテーマソング — Views: 345,900 | Yesterday: 20
BAND-MAID with The Warning / SHOW THEM (Official Teaser Video)  KANAMI vs Dany — Views: 50,084 | Yesterday: 19

choices.text: BAND-MAID / Zen (Official Teaser Video)  MIKU KOBATO Ver.  MAPPAアニメ「全修。」オープニングテーマソング
